summary: Completed frontend testing of 3 new inventory tabs (Compras, Valorización, Auditoría) after refactoring InventoryManager.js. All 10 inventory tabs navigate correctly without errors. All extracted components are functional.

warnings.issue: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchValuationData'
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchAuditLogs'

passed_tests: All 10 tabs are visible: Insumos, Producción, Almacenes, Proveedores, Recetas, Stock, Compras, Valorización, Auditoría, Asistente
Tab navigation between all 10 tabs works without errors
PurchasesTab: Nueva Orden button (data-testid='add-po-btn') is present
PurchasesTab: Nueva Orden dialog opens with supplier/warehouse selects, add item button, save button
PurchasesTab: Purchase orders list displays correctly with status badges
PurchasesTab: Recibir button available for partial orders
ValuationTab: Total inventory value displays correctly (RD$ 2,560.97)
ValuationTab: Dead stock warning displays when applicable
ValuationTab: Valuation table (data-testid='valuation-table') renders with data
AuditTab: Date range filters (start/end date) work
AuditTab: Stats cards display (30 Total de Cambios, 8 Insumos Afectados, 6 Tipos de Campo)
AuditTab: Audit table (data-testid='audit-table') renders with 30 audit rows
Backend API: /api/purchase-orders returns correct PO data
Backend API: /api/reports/inventory-valuation returns valuation data with categories and warehouses
context_for_next_testing_agent: InventoryManager.js refactoring complete. All 10 tabs are working. The 3 new extracted components (PurchasesTab, ValuationTab, AuditTab) are functional. Minor eslint warnings about useEffect dependencies can be addressed later but don't affect functionality.
